debug_info.goal:
Ω : Type u_3
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
μ : Measure Ω
ι : Type u_6
inst✝⁶ : LinearOrder ι
inst✝⁵ : OrderBot ι
inst✝⁴ : Countable ι
inst✝³ : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝² : OrderTopology ι
inst✝¹ : FirstCountableTopology ι
X : ι → Ω → ℝ
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
inst✝ : SigmaFiniteFiltration μ 𝓕
hX : Submartingale X 𝓕 μ
τ : ℕ → Ω → WithTop ι
hτ : ∀ (i : ℕ), IsStoppingTime 𝓕 (τ i)
n : ι
hτ_le : ∀ (i : ℕ) (ω : Ω), τ i ω ≤ ↑n
⊢ UniformIntegrable (fun i => stoppedValue X (τ i)) 1 μ

failed_attempts:
(hX.toMartingaleOfDoobDecomposition.uniformIntegrable_stoppedValue τ hτ hτ_le).add
    (uniformIntegrable_const le_rfl (by simp) (memLp_one_iff_integrable.2 <|
      hX.compensator.integrable _))

(hX.toMartingaleOfDoobDecomposition.fst.uniformIntegrable_stoppedValue τ hτ hτ_le).add
    (uniformIntegrable_const le_rfl (by simp) (memLp_one_iff_integrable.2 <|
      hX.toMartingaleOfDoobDecomposition.snd.nonneg.integrable_of_le_n
        (by simpa using hτ_le 0)))

(hX.toMartingaleOfDoobDecomposition.fst.uniformIntegrable_stoppedValue τ hτ hτ_le).add
    (uniformIntegrable_const le_rfl (by simp) (memLp_one_iff_integrable.2 <|
      hX.toMartingaleOfDoobDecomposition.snd.nonneg.integrable_of_le_n (by simp)))

(hX.toMartingaleAdd.hX.uniformIntegrable_stoppedValue τ hτ hτ_le).add
    (uniformIntegrable_const le_rfl (by simp) (memLp_one_iff_integrable.2 hX.integrable₀))
(hX.toMartingalePlus.uniformIntegrable_stoppedValue τ hτ hτ_le).comp fun i ↦ ⟨i, by simp⟩

(hX.toMartingaleAdd.neg.uniformIntegrable_stoppedValue τ hτ hτ_le).add
    (uniformIntegrable_const le_rfl (by simp) (memLp_one_iff_integrable.2 <| hX.integrable n))

(hX.toMartingaleOfDoobDecomposition.fst.uniformIntegrable_stoppedValue τ hτ hτ_le).add

(hX.toMartingalePlus.uniformIntegrable_stoppedValue τ hτ hτ_le).comp fun i ↦ ⟨i, rfl⟩
